eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Mason; Thurston, WA; at 11:08 AM ON MAY 5, 2026 Effective until 02:08 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Mason County Division of Emergency Management conducting a test of the emergency alert system. In the event of an emergency, this system would bring you important information. The following tones will conclude this test.
